description: This file provides a database connection helper supporting both MySQL and PostgreSQL, with configuration based on environment variables. It includes functions to determine configuration status, create connection pools, execute queries, and close connections.

methods.name: getDbEngine
methods.description: Returns the configured database engine based on environment variables, defaulting to 'mysql'.

methods.name: isMysqlConfigured
methods.description: Checks if MySQL environment variables are set to consider MySQL as configured.

methods.name: isPostgresConfigured
methods.description: Checks if PostgreSQL environment variables are set to consider PostgreSQL as configured.

methods.name: isDbConfigured
methods.description: Determines if the currently selected database engine has proper environment variable configuration.

methods.name: dbQuery
methods.description: Executes a SQL query using the configured database engine, normalizing the result for MySQL and PostgreSQL.

methods.name: dbExecRaw
methods.description: Executes raw SQL without parameters, primarily for migrations.
